languages.original_text: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

languages.text: "Безусловно. В этом можно усмотреть цинизм, но я лишь срезаю лишнее. Люди — непростые существа, я могу часами распространяться про нюансы устройства организма и сознания, приводить размышления теософов и философов. Но это не имеет значения — покуда человек выполняет свою функцию, его жизнь имеет смысл".

"Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

"Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

languages.text: «Por supuesto. Quizá le parezca una opinión cínica, pero solo estoy eliminando lo superfluo. Los humanos no son criaturas sencillas: podría hablar durante horas sobre la estructura del cuerpo y la consciencia y citar reflexiones filosóficas y teosóficas. Pero eso no importa: mientras una persona cumpla con su función, su vida tendrá significado».
languages.original_text: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

traits.locale_text: «Por supuesto. Quizá le parezca una opinión cínica, pero solo estoy eliminando lo superfluo. Los humanos no son criaturas sencillas: podría hablar durante horas sobre la estructura del cuerpo y la consciencia y citar reflexiones filosóficas y teosóficas. Pero eso no importa: mientras una persona cumpla con su función, su vida tendrá significado».

languages.text: “当然。您也许觉得这种观点很冷酷，但我只是剔除了一切多余之物而已。人类并非简单的生物——我可以花几个小时向您详述身体与意识结构之精妙，再引用一堆神学与哲学的思考。但这都无关紧要，只要一个人履行了他的职能，他的生命就有意义。”
languages.original_text: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

traits.locale_text: “当然。您也许觉得这种观点很冷酷，但我只是剔除了一切多余之物而已。人类并非简单的生物——我可以花几个小时向您详述身体与意识结构之精妙，再引用一堆神学与哲学的思考。但这都无关紧要，只要一个人履行了他的职能，他的生命就有意义。”

languages.text: « Absolument. Vous trouvez peut-être mon point de vue cynique, mais je ne fais qu'exciser le superflu. Les humains ne sont pas de simples créatures ; je pourrais passer des heures à vous expliquer toutes les nuances structurelles du corps et de la conscience, tout en vous citant des réflexions théosophiques et philosophiques. Mais c'est sans importance : tant qu'une personne remplit sa fonction, sa vie aura un sens. »
languages.original_text: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

traits.locale_text: « Absolument. Vous trouvez peut-être mon point de vue cynique, mais je ne fais qu'exciser le superflu. Les humains ne sont pas de simples créatures ; je pourrais passer des heures à vous expliquer toutes les nuances structurelles du corps et de la conscience, tout en vous citant des réflexions théosophiques et philosophiques. Mais c'est sans importance : tant qu'une personne remplit sa fonction, sa vie aura un sens. »

languages.text: "Absolut. Ihr mögt mich für zynisch halten, aber ich entferne lediglich alles Überflüssige. Menschen sind keine einfachen Kreaturen – ich könnte Euch stundenlang mit den Nuancen der Struktur des Körpers und Bewusstseins ergötzen und theosophische und philosophische Denkmodelle zitieren. Aber das macht keinen Unterschied ... solange eine Person ihre Funktion erfüllt, hat ihr Leben einen Sinn."
languages.original_text: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

traits.locale_text: "Absolut. Ihr mögt mich für zynisch halten, aber ich entferne lediglich alles Überflüssige. Menschen sind keine einfachen Kreaturen – ich könnte Euch stundenlang mit den Nuancen der Struktur des Körpers und Bewusstseins ergötzen und theosophische und philosophische Denkmodelle zitieren. Aber das macht keinen Unterschied ... solange eine Person ihre Funktion erfüllt, hat ihr Leben einen Sinn."

languages.text: 「その通りだ。皮肉な見方だと思われるかもしれないが、私は余計なものをすべて切り捨てているだけだ。人間は単純な生き物ではない。身体の構造や意識のニュアンス、神学的、哲学的な考察を挙げれば、何時間でも語り尽くせるだろう。しかし、それは何の違いもない。人がその機能を果たす限り、その人生には意味があるのだ」
languages.original_text: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."

languages.text: "Kesinlikle. Bunu alaycı bir görüş olarak algılayabilirsiniz ama ben sadece gereksiz olan her şeyi kesip atıyorum. İnsanlar basit yaratıklar değildir. Sizi saatlerce bedenin ve bilincin yapısının nüanslarıyla oyalayabilir, teozofik ve felsefi düşüncelere atıfta bulunabilirim. Ancak bu hiçbir şeyi değiştirmez... Bir kimse, işlevini yerine getirdiği sürece hayatının anlamı vardır."
languages.original_text: "Absolutely. You may perceive that as a cynical view, but I am merely cutting away all that is superfluous. Humans are not simple creatures — I could regale you for hours with the nuances of the structure of the body and consciousness, and cite theosophical and philosophical musings. But it makes no difference — as long as a person fulfils their function, their life has meaning."
